name: robust-reasoning-reward
content:
## Introduction

Standard reward models fail under distribution shift; robust versions use ensemble and adversarial training. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Standard reward models fail under distribution shift; robust versions use ensemble and adversarial training.
